title: Ray Review Queue Report

top_decisions.title: Enable one Facebook GoClear/Apex test post
top_decisions.summary: Token is valid and publish scopes exist. Approval is required before setting social_accounts.publish_enabled=true for one compliant GoClear/Apex test post. No ads, no boost, no private data, no guarantee claims.
top_decisions.hermes_recommendation: Review this connector setup before any execution path.
pros: Clarifies Ray's direction before risky or strategic work moves forward.
cons: No outbound action should happen until the proper approval path is active.
